contentPattern.structure: image column + text column (eyebrow + heading + paragraph + optional CTA)

suitableFor: single promotional units with image beside text and a CTA
welcome / intro sections with a side-by-side image and copy
notSuitableFor: repeating sets of distinct items (use cards-feature)

implementationNotes: Used for sections 2 (promo banner), 3 (welcome) and 8 (featured-hotel spotlight). Project-native (init(el)). Adds columns-feature-{N}-cols and marks single-picture columns with columns-feature-img-col.
